section.heading: Authorization of appropriations and spending authority

subsection.heading: Authorization of appropriations
subsection.chapeau: Except as provided in subsection (b), there are authorized to be appropriated—

paragraph.chapeau: an amount not to exceed 5 percent of the sum of—

subparagraph.content: the sums received by the Secretary from sales of timber and other products of the forests; and
user fees paid in connection with the use of forest lands; and

paragraph.content: such additional sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.

content.p: Subsection (a) shall not in any way affect payments to the States pursuant to section 500 of title 16.

Any spending authority (as defined in section 651 of title 2) provided in this subchapter shall be effective for any fiscal year only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in appropriation Acts.
